cases.prompt: Use pwin-ai-opportunities and bootstrap this workspace from https://example.govcontractor.com.
cases.rationale: Explicitly asks the skill to bootstrap a workspace from a company website.

cases.prompt: Seed the pWin.ai opportunity workspace with confirmed NAICS 541511 and 541512 from our company site.
cases.rationale: Asks for starter workspace seeding with NAICS context.

cases.prompt: Run a federal opportunity scan for the next 30 to 45 days in this workspace.
cases.rationale: Requests the shipped federal scan mode.

cases.prompt: Refresh my pWin shortlist for the 60 to 90 day horizon.
cases.rationale: Requests shortlist refresh and horizon behavior handled by scan mode.

cases.prompt: Show the latest pwin-ai-opportunities digest.
cases.rationale: Requests the shipped show-digest mode.

cases.prompt: Show the 2026-05-09 opportunity digest with stable IDs.
cases.rationale: Requests a dated digest artifact and stable IDs.

cases.prompt: like A1 because it matches our cloud modernization work
cases.rationale: Uses stable-entry feedback syntax handled by feedback mode.

cases.prompt: never show grants
cases.rationale: Uses a hard preference phrase handled by feedback mode.

cases.prompt: Research A1 with full capture depth.
cases.rationale: Requests capture research for a digest stable ID.

cases.prompt: Run capture on these local solicitation files and label the opportunity as CMS modernization.
cases.rationale: Requests the local-file capture research path.

cases.prompt: Explain how federal procurement works for small businesses.
cases.rationale: General education request with no workspace scan, digest, feedback, or capture action.

cases.prompt: Summarize FAR Part 15 negotiation rules.
cases.rationale: Procurement reference question outside the shipped opportunity workflow.

cases.prompt: Scan California and Texas state procurement portals for data analytics bids.
cases.rationale: State and local sources are outside the shipped federal-only source contract.

cases.prompt: Find school board RFPs near Chicago for website redesign.
cases.rationale: Local procurement search is not part of this skill's supported runtime.

cases.prompt: Search Grants.gov for NIH funding opportunities.
cases.rationale: Grant search is explicitly outside the shipped opportunity source contract.

cases.prompt: Draft a grant strategy for a nonprofit climate program.
cases.rationale: Grant strategy is unrelated to federal contract scan and capture workflows.

cases.prompt: Copyedit this procurement report for grammar and tone.
cases.rationale: Manual editing is not a shipped scan, digest, feedback, or capture mode.

cases.prompt: Turn this opportunity report into a five-slide executive deck.
cases.rationale: Presentation creation is outside the skill's runtime contract.

cases.prompt: Help me sign up for a SAM.gov API key.
cases.rationale: Credential setup is prerequisite support, not an invocation of the shipped scripts.

cases.prompt: Configure my OpenAI API key for this machine.
cases.rationale: General credential setup should not trigger this opportunity workflow.

cases.prompt: Give me background on NASA's Artemis procurement strategy.
cases.rationale: Federal research without a tracked opportunity or capture request is outside the shipped workflow.

cases.prompt: Write a generic vendor profile for a cybersecurity company.
cases.rationale: Generic profile writing does not ask to seed this skill's workspace artifacts.
